title: NextSteps
full_description: What happens when ballet and hip hop engage in a dialogue? It's not about six-step vs. pas de chat. NextSteps goes beyond these stereotypes, bringing together disciplines and dancers of the highest calibre. NextSteps features dynamic new dance pieces in which the classically trained dancers of Junior Company and the energetic performers of ISH Dance Collective create a bold fusion of hip hop and ballet. Dancers from each ensemble step forward to take on the role of choreographer.
ai_summary: NextSteps puts the dancers themselves in the choreographer's chair — Junior Company and ISH Dance Collective performers creating new work that fuses classical ballet with hip-hop, with one additional creator selected through an open call.
